name: Homelab GitOps Remediation (VM → LLM → GitHub PR)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: $('Plan PR').item.json.commitMessage, content: $('Plan PR').item.json.contentB64, branch: $('Plan PR').item.json.branch }) }}

parameters.content:
## GitOps Remediation (env-based)

Uses K8s secrets via `$env` (no n8n Credentials UI):
- `LLM_API_KEY`, `LLM_BASE_URL`
- `GITHUB_TOKEN`

Bootstrap: `just n8n-bootstrap` after deploy.
